The code itself does not contain malicious logic.\n\n- **Analysis & Anomalies:**  \n  The code is standard autogenerated, with no signs of obfuscation or malicious payloads.\n\n- **Score Justification:**  \n  - Malware: 0 — no malicious code detected.  \n  - Security risk: 0.2 — the only potential concern is that connecting to a malicious contract could be risky, but this is inherent to the use case, not the code itself.\n\n- **Score Reasonableness:**  \n  The malware score is correctly low (0).  \n  The security risk is slightly above zero, reflecting that connecting to malicious contracts is possible but not due to code flaws.\n\n- **Conclusion:**  \n  The scores seem reasonable.
